generated_oml:
instance CartStepperMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor that drives the cart, controlled by a Trinamic TMC4671‑Eval evaluation board"
]
instance HoistStepperMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor that drives the hoist, controlled by a Trinamic TMC4671‑Eval evaluation board"
]
instance HoistElectromagnetActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet actuated by an Arduino‑based control board, used to grasp containers at the hoist end"
]
instance CartPositionEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder on the cart motor shaft providing cart position feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmission
]
instance HoistPositionEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder on the hoist motor shaft providing hoist position feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmission
]
instance SwingAngleEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder measuring hoist swing relative to the rail"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmission
]
instance WindSpeedAnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed impacting the crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmission
]
instance CartMotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Shunt current sensor on the cart stepper motor measuring electrical current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartCurrentDataTransmission
]
instance HoistMotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Shunt current sensor on the hoist stepper motor measuring electrical current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistCurrentDataTransmission
]
instance CartPositionDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionEncoderSensor
]
instance HoistPositionDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionEncoderSensor
]
instance SwingAngleDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoderSensor
]
instance WindSpeedDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometerSensor
]
instance CartCurrentDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorCurrentSensor
]
instance HoistCurrentDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorCurrentSensor
]
instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 CAD file of the miniature gantry crane hardware, used for design and validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService, TrajectoryGenerationService
]
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by the Trajectory Generator service to plan swing‑free trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService
]
instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Discrete‑time simulation model of crane dynamics implemented in the Simulation Service"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]
instance CartPositionDataStored : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped cart position records stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmission
]
instance HoistPositionDataStored : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped hoist position records stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistPositionDataTransmission
]
instance SwingAngleDataStored : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped swing angle records stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmission
]
instance WindSpeedDataStored : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped wind speed records stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmission
]
instance CartCurrentDataStored : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped cart motor current records stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartCurrentDataTransmission
]
instance HoistCurrentDataStored : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped hoist motor current records stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistCurrentDataTransmission
]
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database enabling storage of time‑stamped telemetry streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]
instance MosquittoBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker enabling inter‑service messaging via MQTT topics"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]
instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboards enabling real‑time visualization of telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaDashboardService
]
instance PythonRuntimeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python runtime environment enabling Trajectory Generation and Simulation services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]
instance ArduinoControlBoardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino‑based control board enabling streaming of sensor data to the twin via a serial link"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Application that ingests sensor data published from the Arduino and writes it to TimescaleDB"
]
instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that processes MQTT topics for inter‑service communication"
]
instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that computes optimal swing‑free trajectories using the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeTrajectoryInsight, AdjustTrajectoryParametersAction
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs discrete‑time simulation of crane dynamics using the simulation model"
]
instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that compares executed and simulated trajectories in real time with distance metrics and thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationAlertInsight, AdjustControllerGainsAction
]
instance GrafanaDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard service that visualizes telemetry streams using Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDashboardInsight
]
instance HMIService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human‑Machine Interface that allows operators to configure trajectories, adjust controller gains, and initiate maintenance actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceDecisionAction
]
instance RealTimeTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing live trajectory traces and swing metrics for operator awareness"
]
instance ContinuousValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert generated when the distance between real and simulated trajectories exceeds a threshold, indicating degradation"
]
instance FaultClassificationReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Report summarizing fault classifications detected during continuous validation"
]
instance RealTimeDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight displaying real‑time telemetry dashboards using Grafana"
]
instance AdjustTrajectoryParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to tweak trajectory generator parameters based on operator input or automated tuning"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance AdjustControllerGainsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust controller gains for cart and hoist based on swing metrics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance MaintenanceDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to schedule maintenance when fault classification or performance thresholds are breached"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance GantryCraneLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartStepperMotorActuator, HoistStepperMotorActuator, HoistElectromagnetActuator,
            CartPositionEncoderSensor, HoistPositionEncoderSensor, SwingAngleEncoderSensor,
            WindSpeedAnemometerSensor, CartMotorCurrentSensor, HoistMotorCurrentSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Trajectory plans generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are published over MQTT to the Control Application, which translates them into stepper motor commands sent via the Physical Crane Interface to the TMC4671‑Eval drivers, thus commanding cart and hoist motion. The electromagnet is also controlled through this channel when a container is to be picked or released."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twin operates in real time, synchronizing with the physical crane's sensor update and control loop, typically 10–50 Hz. High‑level services such as trajectory generation, simulation, and continuous validation execute on a per‑execution basis (seconds to minutes). Data logging occurs continuously at sensor rate, while trajectory execution commands are dispatched at each control cycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture uses a containerized constellation: the Physical Crane consists of hardware components; the digital side includes six containers: TimescaleDB, Grafana, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, MQTT broker. A Python module (gantrylib) provides a public API; the Control, Logging, and HMI applications consume this API. Docker Compose orchestrates services, automating first‑time setup of database, dashboard, and broker."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin spans three key stages: (1) Design – CAD models and kinematic models are created in Autodesk Fusion 360 and used by services; (2) Manufacturing – the physical lab‑scale crane is built from the BOM (~1250 €) and assembled; (3) Operation – live data logging, validation, trajectory planning and control are performed, while continuous validation ensures fidelity over time."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured by the Continuous Validation Service, which computes distance metrics between real and simulated trajectories and checks against configurable thresholds. Further validation occurs during design via simulation, and during operation the twin logs discrepancies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Interaction between PT and DT occurs over a defined communication stack: Arduino micro‑controller communicates via UART/USB to the PC; the logging and control applications send and receive MQTT messages over the local host running Eclipse Mosquitto. All Docker containers share the default Docker bridge network, enabling seamless inter‑service communication without external networking."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The exemplar is deployed on a single personal computer. Docker Compose brings up TimescaleDB, MQTT broker, and Grafana on the same host. The Python applications run directly on the host's OS. This on‑premises, local deployment uses only open‑source components and no cloud services."
]
